case_title: ASSET ACCEPTANCE, LLC VS. TAK Y WONG et al

docket_entries.description: MINI MINUTES FOR FEB-02-2018 09:30 AM FOR DEPT 302

LAW AND MOTION, 302, PLAINTIFF ASSET ACCEPTANCE, LLC'S HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION - JUDGMENT DEBTOR TAK YEE WONG'S CLAIM OF EXEMPTION IS DENIED. THE LEVYING OFFICE IS DIRECTED TO RELEASE THE FUNDS BEING HELD IN THE AMOUNT OF $1137.18 TO THE JUDGMENT CREDITOR AS PAYMENT ON THE JUDGMENT. THE COURT SHALL PREPARE AN ORDER AND SERVE IT ON ALL PARTIES. JUDGE: RICHARD B. ULMER; CLERK: G. GONZALES; REPORTER: MARIA TORREANO CSR#8600, EMAIL: TORREANOM@AOL.COM; MTORREANO@SFTC.ORG. [302]

calendar.matters:
HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION
Off Calendar Feb-02-2018 Denied
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances:
Robert M. Pave, Esq. of the Law Offices of Robert M. Pave, T:415.385.4249, specially appearing for plaintiff;
No other appearance.

RULING: The Court reviews the judgment debtor's financial statement and rules on PLAINTIFF ASSET ACCEPTANCE, LLC'S HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION as follows:

Judgment debtor TAK YEE WONG'S Claim of Exemption is DENIED. The levying office is directed to release the funds being held in the amount of $1137.18 to the judgment creditor as payment on the judgment. The court shall prepare an order and serve it on all parties.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer; Clerk: G. Gonzales; Reporter: Maria Torreano CSR#8600, email: torreanom@aol.com; mtorreano@sftc.org.
